HomePage.title: Wishlist App MVP
HomePage.subtitle: Keep your dreams in one place
HomePage.metaDescription: Create your ultimate wishlist, organize items, and share with friends.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Create personalized wishlists, customize your page, and share your dreams with friends.
HomePage.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your wishes
HomePage.feature1Desc: Change your profile picture, background, banner, colors, and fonts to match your personal style.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Follow friends, see what they want, and even discover private wishes from people you follow back.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Categorize items, set priorities from 1 to 5, and filter by price to find the perfect gift.
HomePage.embedDesc: Want to show off your wishlist on your own website or blog? Use our customizable widget to embed your top wishes directly.
HomePage.ctaText: Ready to start building your wishlist?

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.wishlist_desc: Add items, share the link with friends.

Settings.usernameHelp: This is your wishlist URL. Use letters, numbers, and dashes.
Settings.themeHelp: The selected theme is applied immediately and saved with your profile settings.
Settings.embedDesc: Copy this iframe code to show your wishlist widget on another site.
Settings.widgetLayoutDesc: Choose how selected items are displayed inside the embedded widget.
Settings.widgetItemSizeDesc: Set the item width for the horizontal grid. Default is 100px.
Settings.widgetItemsDesc: Select up to 5 items. If none are selected, the widget shows the top 5 public items.
Settings.noItems: No items in your wishlist yet.
Settings.widgetPreviewDesc: Preview the embedded widget with your current theme settings.

CreateWishlist.title: Create new list
CreateWishlist.label: List name
CreateWishlist.error_too_short: Title must be at least 3 characters long
